nodes.label: CyberMilo EduOS (Education ERP Product)
nodes.rationale: Positioned as 'One AI Platform for Every Institution' (school, college, university, coaching). Differentiators chosen: AI copilot per role, Student Digital Twin, Smart Campus Command Center, glassmorphism UI, multi-tenant SaaS — depth of AI features is the wedge against baseline ERP competitors identified in the market-gap audit.

nodes.label: EduAI Engine (10 AI Features Layer)
nodes.rationale: Shared AI layer (admission counselor chatbot, digital twin, fee recovery, timetable generator, risk detection, meeting summary, command center, complaint resolver, career path engine, predictive analytics) built into every module so AI is a product differentiator rather than an add-on.

nodes.label: Student Digital Twin
nodes.rationale: Holistic AI-powered student profile (academic, behavioral, psychological, cognitive, career, risk factors) stored in student_profiles table; exists to enable early intervention, personalized learning paths, and career counseling from one data structure.

nodes.label: Glassmorphism Design System
nodes.rationale: Premium futuristic look (blur glass cards, cyber blue #0066FF, neon cyan #00F0FF gradients) chosen to make the product feel high-end; TravelOS guide adds the constraint to use glass only where text contrast stays readable and never white text on light glass.

nodes.label: AI Fee Recovery Assistant
nodes.rationale: Predicts payment delays from parent payment behavior, prioritizes families by risk score, forecasts monthly collection, and personalizes reminder tone — fee collection pain is treated as the workflow that sells the ERP to Indian schools.
